contents:
[package]
name = "hyperon"
version = "0.2.10"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
regex = "1.11.0"
log = "0.4.0"
env_logger = "0.8.4"
directories = "5.0.1"
smallvec = "1.10.0"
im = "15.1.0"
rand = "0.9.0"
dyn-fmt = "0.4.0"
itertools = "0.13.0"
unicode_reader = "1.0.2"

[dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1.0.116"
optional = true

[dependencies.xxhash-rust]
version = "0.8.7"
features = ["xxh3"]
optional = true

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.198"
features = ["derive"]
optional = true

[dependencies.semver]
version = "1.0"
features = ["serde"]
optional = true

[dependencies.git2]
version = "0.18.3"
features = ["vendored-libgit2"]
optional = true

[dependencies.hyperon-common]
path = "./hyperon-common"
version = "0.2.10"

[dependencies.hyperon-atom]
path = "./hyperon-atom"
version = "0.2.10"

[dependencies.hyperon-space]
path = "./hyperon-space"
version = "0.2.10"

[dependencies.hyperon-macros]
path = "./hyperon-macros"
version = "0.2.10"

[dependencies.metta-bus-client]
git = "https://github.com/singnet/das"
tag = "1.0.2"
package = "metta-bus-client"
optional = true

[dev-dependencies]
ra_ap_profile = "0.0.261"

[lib]
name = "hyperon"
path = "src/lib.rs"
crate-type = ["lib"]

[features]
default = ["pkg_mgmt", "das"]
variable_operation = []
online-test = []
git = ["git2", "pkg_mgmt"]
pkg_mgmt = ["xxhash-rust", "serde", "serde_json", "semver"]
benchmark = []
das = ["metta-bus-client"]

[package]
name = "hyperon-atom"
version = "0.2.10"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
log = "0.4.0"
smallvec = "1.10.0"
bitset = "0.1.2"
unescaper = "0.1.5"

[dependencies.hyperon-common]
path = "./hyperon-common"
version = "0.2.10"

[dependencies.hyperon-macros]
path = "./hyperon-macros"
version = "0.2.10"

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
crate-type = ["lib"]

[package]
name = "hyperon-common"
version = "0.2.10"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
log = "0.4.0"
itertools = "0.13.0"

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
crate-type = ["lib"]

[package]
name = "hyperon-macros"
version = "0.2.10"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
litrs = "0.5.1"

[lib]
proc-macro = true

[package]
name = "hyperon-space"
version = "0.2.10"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
log = "0.4.0"
smallvec = "1.10.0"
bimap = "0.6.3"

[dependencies.hyperon-atom]
path = "./hyperon-atom"
version = "0.2.10"

[dependencies.hyperon-common]
path = "./hyperon-common"
version = "0.2.10"

[dependencies.hyperon-macros]
path = "./hyperon-macros"
version = "0.2.10"

[dev-dependencies]
criterion = "0.7"

[dev-dependencies.hyperon]
path = "./lib"
version = "0.2.10"

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
crate-type = ["lib"]

[[bench]]
name = "atom_index"
harness = false
